demo.title: Create a community BURGERS/FTP vault on Robinhood Chain from an X post
demo.code:
@bankrbot make a community vault for our crew, owner 0xABC…

-> 1. predictAddress(owner, 416600, 424800, salt) — free
   2. createVault(...) on the LIVE factory 0xd41a8E5c…88Ec (~3M gas)
   3. Reply: vault address + "owner must adoptPosition() before deposits work"
   Deposits are USDG; every deposit mints food-funding FTP 1:1 (verified source).

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured and wallet funded with a little ETH on Robinhood Chain (chain 4663)
The factory is ALREADY DEPLOYED at 0xd41a8E5c44c4a83F6406eB7B530429E5411588Ec (Sourcify exact_match) — never deploy it
createVault needs a vaultOwner wallet from the requester — ask if not given
A new vault is NOT active until its owner calls adoptPosition(tokenId) with a BURGERS/FTP V4 position — say so in every reply
